name: Booking Holdings
analysis: BKNG's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 22% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at $181.6334. Trade idea: entry $181.4600, stop $156.5388, target $207.4982 (1.04:1) — then trail it.
